title: Wobbly Whisker and the Mountaintop Fish House
summary: Wobbly Whisker, the brave security cat, springs into action to rescue a cold baby bunny stranded on a piece of bark drifting in the lake. Using a special element boat, the security cats paddle across the water to safely deliver the bunny to a patch of green grass before returning her home. In gratitude, the bunny family catches fresh fish for the cats, leading to a wonderful feast. Afterward, the cats join Pixie and Jane to help them scale a steep mountain. At the summit, they find Ginger living in an incredible house made entirely of fish, supplied by a surprising mountaintop grocery store.

highlightQuote.text: No. They come from the grocery store.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And now we need to turn on Chicky's light.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh... Let's see about that. There. Oh, it doesn't glow in the ceiling.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: All right. Now it's time for stars and stories.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Sleeping on... security cats.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And Wobbly Whisker the security cat.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wobbly Whisker the security cat said [snoring]...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Wake up, wake up, Wobbly Whisker!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh... What's going on? Why are you waking me up?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Cause... we have a problem.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: What's that?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: There's some bunnies wants to get from Rust Nibble on the other side of the lake, floating on a chunk of bark. But...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: When I poked them with a stick to make them come closer, they drift away further from me.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh no! Bunny's in trouble, said Wobbly Whisker.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: There's only one of them, and they... and they're huddling together. And there's only one of them.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wait, there's one bunny?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And she's holding her arms around her... she's very cold.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Poor bunny! What can we do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: To get her to the grass and then back across.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah, we got to rescue her!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: But... Wobbly Whisker says, I don't know how to swim, and I don't have any boats. I don't have a helicopter.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I have a boat.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You do? What kind of boat is it?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Is it a canoe or a row boat, or a motor boat, or a fishing boat?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No. No, there's a downstairs called an element boat. And then, here's the element boat, here.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And guys hop, hop in. Hop in, security cats.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the security cats hopped right in, but what... what does the element boat look like? I don't know what an element boat is.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It has a big... it has a small body, just the size of like this big.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then, there's a point in the front, some seats, paddles, and they paddle together.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And now, since you've hopped into the boat in the river, now release it from the dock which you're in, okay?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, so we hopped in the boat, the security cats, and then we released it from the dock, and then they started rowing... row, row, row, row.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And the log drifted.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh no!

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And the log drifted towards the boat.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh! Oh, good. Okay.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Towards the boat, until it was nearly close enough to touch.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Wobbly Whisker said, Bunny, Bunny, we're here to help you. Are you okay?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And she hopped into the boat.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh! Oh, that was unexpected! That was a very good hop that you just made. Now you're going to be safe, don't worry. We'll row you back to the shore.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And what did the bunny say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I need, I need some delicious grass... on the other side of the river.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, well we can row you over to that side, no problem.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Row, row, row, row. And so the security cats rowed the bunny over to the other side where there was delicious green grass. And what did the bunny do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She ate a little, and said, I need help going back to shore.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh! Okay, we'll row you back to the other side, no problem.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so the security cats rowed the bunny back all the way across to the other side.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then what did the bunny do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She hopped away to her mommy. And what did her mommy say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Thank goodness you're home, said the bunny mama.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then the security cats went back to their flower castle.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And what did the bunny say, the baby bunny?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, the baby bunny said, I'm happy to be home.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And can you tell your mommy about the adventure?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, I, um, I saw a really interesting piece of bark, and I hopped onto it, but then it slid right down the bank and into the water. And before I knew it, I was floating way, way away from the shore and it was so cold. But then along came some really nice security cats in their element boat, and I hopped in their boat, and they rowed me over to the grass and I ate it, and then I hopped back in, and they rowed me back here.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the mama bunny said, Oh! Maybe we should do something nice as a thank you gift.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The security cats. They're going to give you a thank you gift.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Meow meow, what's it going to be?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so the mama bunny and the baby bunny thought together about what they might give as a gift. And the baby bunny said, Maybe some clover! That's the most delicious thing in the world, isn't it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah. And the mama bunny said, Well, it is a nice idea, but I don't know, cats really like clover? Do they like clover? What do cats like?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They like fish.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh yeah! But I don't know how to catch fish, said the baby bunny.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But the mommy can do it for you, and the dad can watch you.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And how did the mama bunny catch a fish?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She went in a, in a fishing boat, and she fished for one, two, three, four, five fish.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wow!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then, did they row over to the security cats and give them the bag?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And rowed over to the security cats, and gave them... bag, wrapped it all up in a bundle and tied it.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then what did the cats say?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Meow meow, thank you! That smells delicious. Is it fresh fish?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: You got to open it and see.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Wobbly Whisker ripped open the bundle and said, Ooh! [munching] and ate one of the fish.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the other cat said, Oh, save some for me. And Wobbly Whisker said, Well, shouldn't we invite our friends over for a meal? Come on in, bunnies! The whole bunny family is invited.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And we'll get some clover for you so you can have it, because you probably don't like fish.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so the whole bunny family came over to the security cats' castle and they had a fish and clover feast.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And one cat came meowing along. Meow!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh! Who's this?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Pixie.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, hi Pixie. What brings you to the security cat castle?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I helped... I followed my friend Jane, we were climbing up big mountain... we got to last, to last staircase, and the staircase... when you look at the staircase, it wasn't a staircase at all. It was a ramp.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And, oh no, we need help climbing it.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh! said Wobbly Whisker. Now that is a funny kind of mystery. And what's at the top of this mountain that you need to get to?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Um, we just want to see if our friend's awake. It's not a volcano.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It's not a volcano. If who's awake?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: If our friend's awake, Ginger.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, is Ginger on top of the mountain?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes, Ginger's on top of the mountain.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh! Well, if you expected there to be stairs but there weren't any, maybe you were on the wrong path. Let's go and search.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But the mountain has a path. Up, up, up! It has a path. And they saw a person down... they were putting some stairs on the mountain. They're putting some stairs on the mountain. Oh, they're putting some stairs on the mountain on the path.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: So we could, so we can go up to Ginger.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, excellent. Go and meet Ginger?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And the cats...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah, yes we do.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Oh, I see Ginger coming down to us.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Meow meow, here she is.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Meow meow, I'm Ginger.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Nice to meet you, Ginger. Could we come and visit your mountaintop house?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so they all went up to the top of the mountain, and they visited Ginger's house. And what does she have in her house?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Fish, fish, fish, fish. Just fish, just only fish and water.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, that sounds like a very tasty place.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Fish, fish, fish, fish. Very tasty place. And her house is made out of fish!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Wobbly Whisker says, I've never seen a house made out of fish! And how did you get all these fish onto the top of this mountain?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Do you have a very, very, very long fishing rod? Or do you use a bucket on a very long rope? Or does someone fly you here, like a bird friend? Or do you get them here in a hot air balloon, or by airplane? How do you get all these fish here?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know, I don't know, I don't know, I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You don't know where your fish come from?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It wasn't any of those things. Did they fall from the sky?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No. They come from the grocery store.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Wobbly Whisker says, There's a grocery store on this mountaintop? That's amazing!

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, thanks for showing around, showing us around your fish house.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And that is the end of stars and stories.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Shadow puppets! Shadow puppets!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And after shadow puppets we're going to do change and diaper and then the mama will come in.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Those llamas, I love it.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: All right, that's the end of shadow puppets.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Thank you... Oh good job covering the light.

characters.name: Wobbly Whisker
characters.description: A small kitten who gets lost on the Planet of the Mookers and becomes very sticky.

characters.name: Baby Bunny
characters.description: A toy or character searched for at the end of the evening.

characters.name: Mama Bunny
characters.description: The baby bunny's mother, who prepares a fresh fish bundle for the security cats.

characters.name: Papa Bunny
characters.description: The baby bunny's father, who accompanies the family and watches the fishing.

characters.name: Pixie
characters.description: A nimble operative in Kitty’s elite superhero squad, this scholarly feline balances tactical missions and Ginger Catasorry studies with a profound appreciation for restorative slumber. Currently navigating a perilous underground expedition, the talking adventurer greets each waking moment with a signature "Hello, hello," shifting seamlessly from a quiet nap to the sharp-eyed focus required for subterranean survival.

characters.name: Jane
characters.description: Dimetar’s matronly childhood companion is a kindhearted cat and daring ship’s pilot, a friend to Finn, Isabella, and Scratch Cat who navigates the expedition toward Mouse Castle and the road to Cadasori. Her cockpit is a warm sanctuary distinguished by a "love you" sticker and a cabin teeming with whiskered passengers, reflecting the same tenderness she first offered Silver. Though she maintains a bold pace, she is easily swayed by snacks at Seeker’s house or waylaid within the tangled depths of the dark forest. An adventurous spirit with whimsical desires, she currently dreams of a special little hat adorned with rainbow feathers, glitter, and a miniature fishy pond to crown her nautical ensemble.

characters.name: Ginger
characters.description: A soft, round, and silver-coated feline, this exceptionally fluffy educator is one of Minnie and Mickey’s own kittens grown into a figure of quiet authority. Known for daintily distributing napkins with velvet paws and commuting to school behind the wheel, the gray-furred teacher balances his role on Nana’s welcoming committee with a life of polite, helpful service. Whether presiding over his humble sanctuary—the very cage Seeker once coveted—or sustaining himself on crunchy kibble and savory wet food, he remains a steady presence, most recently seen trading his classroom duties for the shadows of a secret closet hideout alongside Garfield.

places.name: Rust Nibble
places.description: The home of the bunny family, located across the lake.

places.name: Flower Castle
places.description: The beautiful home base where the security cats live.

places.name: Mountain
places.description: The high, windy location where Icicle resides.

places.name: Ginger's House
places.description: A fantastical house built completely out of fish.

places.name: Grocery Store
places.description: A distant neighborhood shop stocked with soda, crisp celery, and jewel-toned pomegranates, forever etched in the trio’s memory for the bananas they gathered and the messy remains of squished raspberries. It remains a whimsical local sanctuary where, amidst the nostalgia, even the resident mice can be found purchasing small bowls of hearty vegetable soup.
